PreInvocation.command: if [ -f '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -r '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -x '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ]; then ORCA_ANTIGRAVITY_EVENT='PreInvocation' /bin/sh '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh'; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || :; fi

PostInvocation.command: if [ -f '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -r '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -x '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ]; then ORCA_ANTIGRAVITY_EVENT='PostInvocation' /bin/sh '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh'; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || :; fi

Stop.command: if [ -f '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -r '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -x '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ]; then ORCA_ANTIGRAVITY_EVENT='Stop' /bin/sh '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh'; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || :; fi

hooks.command: if [ -f '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -r '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ] && [ -x '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh' ]; then ORCA_ANTIGRAVITY_EVENT='PostToolUse' /bin/sh '__HOME__/.orca/agent-hooks/antigravity-hook.sh'; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1 || :; fi
